channel.title: Deep Dives with Ian
channel.description: Recent content on Deep Dives with Ian

item.title: Welcome
item.description:
A Brief introduction

This is a short form site that will most likely change as time goes on that will be where I put my individual changes and ideas. I am not sure exactly how often or what I will cover, but I want to make sure that I am doing something that is built by me and for me!

I will eventually link things and be more specific on what my individual set up is, right now this is a very niche place that will be my home on the world wide webs.
